name: Poppy Seed Cookies#1
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Poppy seed, washed and soaked in warm water.
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar until well combined.
2. Add oil, poppy seeds, and vanilla/almond flavor to the egg mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Gradually add flour and baking powder, stirring until a dough forms.
4. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch (about 3mm).
5. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
6. Place the cookies on a greased baking sheet.
7. Sprinkle tops with a little sugar.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
